data.description:
Wire the optional-dependency surface.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [agents] (model SDK + langchain>=1,<2 + exact-pinned langgraph stack); net-new [eval], [tracing].
- [ ] guard_import raises a clear error naming the exact `pip install nava-rebar[<extra>]`.
- [ ] [tracing] documented as a write-only sink (OTel never an input to a rebar decision).
Files: pyproject.toml, src/rebar/llm/config.py, src/rebar/_optional.py
data.title: WS-J1: Extras taxonomy + guard_import
